## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./gradlew test`
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew jacocoTestReport jacocoTestCoverageVerification` when changing application code
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, configuration, or workflows changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, passwords, or production credentials
- [ ] I verified logs do not expose sensitive data
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility for public endpoints, env vars, and integrations
- [ ] I completed a self-review before merge
- [ ] I requested or performed an AI review focused on bugs, regressions, and security

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual validation
- [ ] Not applicable
